OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The token of the user who represents the connector in the OpenCTI platform.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope or type of data the connector is importing, either a MIME type or Stix Object (for information only).

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: Determines the verbosity of the logs.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: Duration between two scheduled runs of the connector (ISO 8601 format).

COFENSE_THREATHQ_TOKEN_USER.description: Token User associated with the user to access the Cofense ThreatHQ API.

COFENSE_THREATHQ_TOKEN_PASSWORD.description: Token Password associated with the user to access the Cofense ThreatHQ API.

COFENSE_THREATHQ_IMPORT_START_DATE.description: Start date of first import (ISO date format or ISO 8601 duration).

COFENSE_THREATHQ_API_BASE_URL.description: Base URL of the Cofense ThreatHQ API.

COFENSE_THREATHQ_API_RETRY.description: Maximum number of retry attempts in case of API failure.

COFENSE_THREATHQ_API_BACKOFF.description: Exponential backoff duration between API retries (ISO 8601 duration format).

COFENSE_THREATHQ_IMPACT_TO_EXCLUDE.description: List of impact types to exclude: none, moderate, major.

COFENSE_THREATHQ_IMPORT_REPORT_PDF.description: Import Cofense ThreatHQ reports in pdf format.

COFENSE_THREATHQ_TLP_LEVEL.description: Traffic Light Protocol (TLP) level to apply on objects imported into OpenCTI.

COFENSE_THREATHQ_PROMOTE_OBSERVABLES_AS_.description: Boolean to promote observables into indicators.
